notes: Source attestation manifest for portable source authority. Updated Waha now points at the supplied 2026-05-17 one-pager revision mirrored to Copyparty; Waha fact acceptance remains blocked until bounded vision extraction and independent verification exist. Bird in Hand records source identity and target page renders; Monster Island records supplied PDF metadata plus candidate page render hashes/dimensions. Spirit facts remain blocked pending permission, bounded extraction, and independent vision verification.
